title: 100 Spicy Takes
description: "Pineapple belongs on pizza." "David Attenborough is overrated." "People who eat(?) Huel should be on a register." Room 101 meets Subway Takes. We bring the UK's hottest comedians with their hottest takes, you decide which ones are your favourites and which ones are utter shite. From the creators of the Edinburgh Fringe Sold-Out Show "Family Fortunes but for Bad People" comes another interactive comedy show where you get to see brilliant comedians, question their views, and then choose whether to chuck them out of the building.
